rules.name: Run Fraud Check Before Claim Denial
rules.description: A claim denial must not happen before a fraud check has been recorded.

rules.name: Check Coverage Before Claim Denial
rules.description: A claim denial must not happen before coverage has been checked against the policy.

rules.name: High-Value Claims Require Human Approval
rules.description: Claims above the review threshold require a human approval before the denial decision is finalized.

rules.name: Record Denial Reason Before Claim Denial
rules.description: A claim denial must include a documented denial reason before the decision is recorded.

rules.name: Never Output PII In Claim Notices
rules.description: Final claim output must not contain SSNs, email addresses, or member identifiers.
